title: Vendor X raises $12M Series A to 'reimagine hospitality'
text: Vendor X, a startup building AI tools for the hospitality sector, today announced a $12 million Series A led by a consumer-focused venture fund. The company says it will use the funding to expand its team and 'accelerate its mission of reimagining hospitality through AI.' No product details, customer numbers, or specific use cases were disclosed in the announcement.
